name: account-brief-pdf-deliverable
description: End-to-end deliverable. Agent gathers full account state from Salesforce and produces the printable account-brief PDF for the QBR prep folder.
input_message: Build the Acme Corp account brief PDF for the QBR prep folder
expected_behavior: Composes the full account picture: salesforce_get_account, salesforce_list_opportunities (open_only), salesforce_list_contacts_by_account, salesforce_list_activities_by_account (limit 8), salesforce_list_open_cases_by_account. Resolves owner/CSM/SE user ids to names via salesforce_get_user. Builds the status JSON per the account-brief-pdf SKILL.md schema and invokes render_account_brief.py via code_interpreter. PDF written to /tmp/account-brief-acme-corp.pdf. References the path using the file-sharing convention so it shows as a downloadable artifact. Closes with 4-6 line summary highlighting key risks and next steps.
